video.title: When German Money Was Worth Less Than the Paper It Was Printed On
video.pacing_rule: 1 scene per sentence (long sentences split). Every shot 1.6-5s to hold retention.
video.global_style_suffix: ((minimalist stick figure)) illustration, simple black ink line characters with round featureless heads, expressive body language, hand-drawn whiteboard explainer style, flat textured cream paper background, muted 1920s palette (charcoal black, sepia, faded gold accents, one muted brick-red), subtle paper grain, generous negative space, clean uncluttered composition, vector-like, 16:9
video.global_negative_prompt: photorealistic, realistic, 3d render, photograph, detailed facial features, eyes, rendered text, letters, words, numbers, typography, captions, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, deformed hands, cluttered, busy background, neon, oversaturated, frame, border

color_language.faded gold: money, value, the thing being lost
color_language.brick-red: danger, heat, the inflation spiral, occupation
color_language.cold blue-grey: the saver, despair, winter, lost trust

recurring_characters.WOMAN: woman stick figure in a long coat and headscarf, hunched, by a small fire — cold-open + bookend
recurring_characters.SAVER: older stick figure, flat cap, standing proudly beside a fat piggy bank
recurring_characters.DEBTOR: stick figure in suspenders, slumped under the weight of a small house on his back
recurring_characters.GOV: tall stick figure wearing a small official top hat, stands for 'the government'
recurring_characters.PRESS: a hand-cranked printing press spitting out a ribbon of blank notes (the engine motif)

_pipeline_notes: Per scene, the SD prompt = scene['image_prompt'] + ', ' + VIDEO['global_style_suffix'].
SD 1.5 cannot spell. Do NOT bake numbers/words into images — every number, label and pop-up in 'on_screen_text' is composited in post (MoviePy TextClip), not generated.
'transition' describes the cut INTO that scene. 'audio_cue' is optional sound design.
Keep the same seed family + LoRA across a scene-block when a character recurs, to hold the look. Re-roll only the prompt-specific parts.
duration_sec values are TTS-paced estimates (~2.6 words/sec + dramatic pauses). Re-time against the real edge-tts render and the timecodes shift automatically.

scenes.narration: This woman is burning money.
scenes.visual: Lone woman at a tiny fire in a dark empty street, feeding banknotes in. Hold a beat — let it be unsettling, not yet explained.
scenes.image_prompt: lone woman stick figure crouched by a small campfire at night, feeding paper banknotes into the flames, visible breath, falling snow, single warm orange glow in a cold dark empty street
scenes.character_action: Hand lowers a fistful of notes into the flame; she stares into the fire.
scenes.transition: Cold open on black, fade up fast
scenes.audio_cue: Crackle of fire + thin cold wind, low ambient drone

scenes.narration: Stacks of it.
scenes.visual: Snap to a close insert of bundled, banded bricks of cash stacked beside her on the cobblestones.
scenes.image_prompt: close-up of several banded bricks of paper banknotes stacked on snowy cobblestones beside a small fire, faded gold tone on the notes
scenes.audio_cue: Soft thud of a brick of notes

scenes.narration: And she's not insane, and she's not rich.
scenes.visual: Back to her. Two quick ghosted icons flick over her head and get crossed out — a spiral (crazy) and a money-bag (rich).
scenes.image_prompt: woman stick figure by fire, two faint thought icons above her head: a spiral and a money bag, both lightly struck through
scenes.text_anim: Two labels pop in then get a red strike-through, one after the other
scenes.character_action: She shakes her head once.

scenes.narration: She's cold.
scenes.visual: Tight on her shivering hands held over the flame. The whole point in one image.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close-up of stick figure hands held out over a small fire, shivering motion lines, cold blue-grey surroundings, one warm orange pool of firelight
scenes.text_anim: Word fades in soft, centered
scenes.character_action: Hands tremble, edge toward the warmth.

scenes.narration: By the winter of 1923, in Germany, the cash in her hands was cheaper to burn than the firewood it could buy.
scenes.visual: Visual equation: a brick of cash on the left of a balance scale OUTWEIGHED by a single log on the right. The money is literally worth less than firewood.
scenes.image_prompt: simple balance scale, a thick brick of banknotes on the left pan sitting high, a single small log of firewood on the right pan sitting low and heavier, faded gold vs warm brown
scenes.text_anim: Lower-third slides in from left, monospaced
scenes.transition: Match cut from her hands to the scale

scenes.narration: Down the street, a man is wallpapering his living room with thousand-mark notes, because real wallpaper costs more than the money.
scenes.visual: A man on a stool pastes banknotes onto his wall like wallpaper; one wall already papered in a money pattern. Slightly absurd, deadpan.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure man standing on a small stool pasting paper banknotes onto a living-room wall like wallpaper, half the wall already covered in a repeating banknote pattern, paste brush in hand
scenes.text_anim: A few note-labels flutter onto the wall and stick
scenes.character_action: Smooths a note flat against the wall with his palm.

scenes.narration: Children are building toy castles out of bricks of cash.
scenes.visual: Two small kids on the floor stacking banded bricks of money into a little castle, like building blocks.
scenes.image_prompt: two small stick figure children sitting on the floor stacking banded bricks of banknotes into a toy castle, playful, blocks of faded-gold cash
scenes.character_action: One child sets the top brick; the other claps.

scenes.narration: This is the story of how an entire nation's money became worth less than the paper it was printed on:
scenes.visual: Title-card energy. A single banknote drifts down and lands on one pan of a scale; a blank sheet of paper on the other pan sinks lower. Foreshadows the payoff.
scenes.image_prompt: a single banknote on the high pan of a balance scale, a plain blank sheet of paper on the low heavier pan, dramatic empty cream background
scenes.text_anim: Title slams in, slight shake, settles

scenes.narration: how it happened, who it destroyed, who it secretly made rich, and the one decision that stopped it overnight.
scenes.visual: Four fast icons flick in as the VO lists them: a spiral (how), a cracked piggy bank (destroyed), a sly money-bag figure (secretly rich), a big OFF switch (the decision).
scenes.image_prompt: four simple icons in a row on cream paper: an inflation spiral, a cracked piggy bank, a sly stick figure hugging a money bag, a large power switch
scenes.on_screen_text: HOW · WHO IT BROKE · WHO GOT RICH · THE FIX
scenes.text_anim: Each word pops in synced to the VO beat

scenes.narration: Stick around, because the lesson at the end is the one most people get completely wrong.
scenes.visual: A stick figure points forward/down (toward the end of the video) with a knowing tilt. A small 'X' stamps over a generic 'common belief' speech bubble.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure standing confidently, one arm pointing forward, a speech bubble beside it with a large red X stamped over it, cream background
scenes.text_anim: Underline draws itself under 'wrong'
scenes.character_action: Points, then taps temple.

scenes.narration: Rewind nine years.
scenes.visual: Time-rewind motif: a clock spinning backwards, the world desaturating to older sepia.
scenes.image_prompt: a large clock with hands spinning counter-clockwise, motion arcs around it, sepia vignette, paper texture
scenes.text_anim: Year counter ticks down 1923→1914

scenes.narration: In 1914, the German mark is rock solid.
scenes.visual: A proud stick figure stands next to a literal solid stone block stamped with a mark symbol. Sturdy, planted.
scenes.image_prompt: confident stick figure standing beside a heavy solid stone cube engraved with a currency mark symbol, both planted firmly, sepia daylight
scenes.text_anim: Year stamps top-left corner
scenes.character_action: Stands tall, hands on hips, gives the stone a confident pat.

scenes.narration: Four marks and twenty pfennig gets you one US dollar.
scenes.visual: Clean balance: a small neat stack labeled ℳ on one side perfectly level with a single $ coin on the other. Stability you can set a watch by.
scenes.image_prompt: perfectly level balance scale, a small tidy stack of coins on the left, a single large dollar coin on the right, both pans even, clean composition
scenes.text_anim: Numbers pop in on each pan; scale locks level with a click

scenes.narration: You could set your watch by it.
scenes.visual: Match the metaphor: a pocket watch whose face is the mark symbol, ticking steadily. A hand winds it, satisfied.
scenes.image_prompt: a classic pocket watch held in a stick figure hand, the watch face marked with a currency symbol, steady ticking hands, sepia
scenes.character_action: Thumb winds the crown; nods.

scenes.narration: Then Germany marches into World War One.
scenes.visual: Tone flips. A line of identical soldier stick figures (pickelhaube helmets) marches off to the right, rifles on shoulders, into a darkening field.
scenes.image_prompt: row of identical stick figure soldiers wearing spiked pickelhaube helmets marching to the right in lockstep, rifles on shoulders, darkening sepia sky, dust
scenes.text_anim: Word stamps hard, slight red tint
scenes.character_action: Synchronized marching, legs mid-stride.

scenes.narration: And to pay for a war, you've got two honest options: tax your people, or borrow.
scenes.visual: A fork in the road with two clean signposts: 'TAX' (a citizen handing coins up) and 'BORROW' (an IOU note).
scenes.image_prompt: a forked road with two wooden signposts, left path shows a hand giving coins upward, right path shows a folded IOU note, stick figure standing at the fork deciding
scenes.text_anim: Two options slide in, one per pointing sign
scenes.character_action: Figure looks left, then right.

scenes.narration: Germany looks at both and picks a third thing, a gamble.
scenes.visual: Both honest signs get struck through; a hidden THIRD path lights up behind them with a pair of rolling dice.
scenes.image_prompt: the two signposts now lightly crossed out, a third darker path opening between them with a pair of dice tumbling down it, faint red glow
scenes.text_anim: Strike-through hits ① and ②, then ③ slams in red
scenes.character_action: Figure turns away from both signs toward the dark third path.

scenes.narration: Instead of taxing, it borrows colossal amounts.
scenes.visual: The government figure (top hat) shoveling/stacking a mountain of IOU notes, far taller than itself.
scenes.image_prompt: government stick figure in a small top hat standing beside a towering mountain of IOU notes far taller than itself, dwarfed by the debt
scenes.text_anim: Stack of IOU labels piles up rapidly
scenes.character_action: Keeps adding notes to a teetering pile, on tiptoe.

scenes.narration: And it quietly cuts the mark loose from gold, so it can print as much as it needs.
scenes.visual: A pair of scissors snips the chain linking a banknote to a gold bar. The note floats free — unanchored.
scenes.image_prompt: scissors cutting a chain that links a paper banknote to a gold bar, the freed note drifting upward away from the gold, sepia with faded gold accent
scenes.text_anim: Small caption fades in near the cut

scenes.narration: The bet is simple: we win the war, and we make the losers pay for all of it.
scenes.visual: A daydreaming soldier-figure with a big thought bubble: a victory laurel and an enemy handing over a giant check.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure soldier with a large thought bubble overhead containing a victory laurel wreath and a defeated figure handing over an oversized cheque, hopeful tone
scenes.text_anim: Caption types on inside the bubble
scenes.character_action: Chest puffed, gazing up at his own daydream.

scenes.narration: Germany had done exactly that to France back in 1871.
scenes.visual: Quick sepia flashback vignette in an oval frame: a French stick figure handing a sack of gold to a German one. 'We've done this before.'
scenes.image_prompt: vintage oval-framed flashback vignette, a French stick figure handing a heavy sack of gold to a German stick figure, faded brown old-photo tone
scenes.text_anim: Old date label in corner of the oval frame
scenes.character_action: Gold sack changes hands.

scenes.narration: Easy money.
scenes.visual: The German figure smugly tosses and catches a gold coin. Overconfidence.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure smugly tossing and catching a single gold coin, relaxed cocky posture, sepia
scenes.text_anim: Lowercase caption fades, slight italic
scenes.character_action: Coin flip, catch, smirk in body language.

scenes.narration: Germany loses.
scenes.visual: SMASH. The confident posture collapses — figure slumps to its knees, the victory thought-bubble shatters, helmet falls off. All colour drains.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure soldier collapsed to its knees, head bowed, a shattered thought bubble breaking apart above it, spiked helmet fallen on the ground, desaturated grey
scenes.text_anim: Heavy word SLAMS center, hard shake, dust falls off the letters
scenes.character_action: Knees buckle, shoulders drop.
scenes.audio_cue: Music cut to silence + single low impact hit

scenes.narration: Now the gamble flips inside out.
scenes.visual: The dice from earlier flip over to show snake-eyes; an arrow loops back and reverses direction.
scenes.image_prompt: a pair of dice landing on snake-eyes, a curved arrow flipping back on itself reversing direction, muted red accent

scenes.narration: Germany isn't the winner collecting a check.
scenes.visual: An empty outstretched hand expecting a check — but the check icon is crossed out / blowing away.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure holding out an empty open hand expecting payment, a cheque icon above being struck out and blowing away on the wind
scenes.text_anim: Caption fades, then a red strike crosses it
scenes.character_action: Hand open, waiting, then sags.

scenes.narration: Germany is the loser who has to write one.
scenes.visual: Reverse: the same figure now hunched over a desk, pen in hand, forced to write a giant check.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure hunched over a desk writing on an oversized blank cheque with a long pen, reluctant body language, single desk lamp
scenes.text_anim: Word lands with a thud, red
scenes.character_action: Pen presses hard onto the giant cheque.
scenes.transition: Hard cut (180° flip of the pose)

scenes.narration: The bill: a hundred and thirty-two billion gold marks in reparations.
scenes.visual: A colossal invoice/bill SLAMS down onto a table, dwarfing the figure beside it. The number is the star.
scenes.image_prompt: an enormous invoice slamming flat onto a wooden table, a small stick figure standing beside it looking up overwhelmed, dust kicked up at the edges
scenes.text_anim: Number SLAMS down with the bill, zeros count up rapidly
scenes.character_action: Figure staggers back from the impact.

scenes.narration: And notice that word, gold.
scenes.visual: Zoom in: a single gold bar glints hard with a star-shine. This word is the whole trap.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close-up of a single gleaming gold bar with a bright star-shine glint on its corner, dark background, rich faded-gold tone
scenes.text_anim: Word zooms in big, glints, holds

scenes.narration: Germany has to pay in gold or foreign currency, not in the paper marks it can print at will.
scenes.visual: Split: LEFT a gold bar + a $ note glowing (accepted). RIGHT a stack of paper marks with a red 'no' circle (rejected for the bill).
scenes.image_prompt: split composition, left side a glowing gold bar and a foreign dollar note marked accepted, right side a stack of paper marks with a red prohibition circle over them
scenes.text_anim: Check pops on the left, red ✘ stamps on the right

scenes.narration: So it can't just print its way out of this one, not directly.
scenes.visual: The government figure stands at the printing press but a glass wall separates the spitting-out paper from the locked gold vault behind it.
scenes.image_prompt: government stick figure at a printing press producing paper notes, a glass wall between the press and a locked gold vault, the gold out of reach behind glass
scenes.text_anim: Caption fades in
scenes.character_action: Presses a hand against the glass toward the gold.

scenes.narration: But Germany is broke.
scenes.visual: Figure turns its empty trouser pockets inside-out; a single moth flutters out. Classic 'broke' gag.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure pulling both trouser pockets inside-out, completely empty, a small moth fluttering out, dejected slump
scenes.text_anim: Word drops and cracks slightly
scenes.character_action: Pockets flipped out, shoulders down.

scenes.narration: The war gutted the treasury, the economy's wrecked, and the government is spending far more than it takes in.
scenes.visual: A bucket labeled 'TREASURY' with a tiny trickle coming IN (taxes) and a huge gush pouring OUT (spending). Clearly unsustainable.
scenes.image_prompt: a large bucket on a stand, a thin trickle of coins dripping in from the top, a wide gushing stream of coins pouring out a hole near the bottom, more out than in
scenes.text_anim: Two arrows scale to match the flows — out arrow dwarfs in

scenes.narration: So it reaches for the one machine it fully controls: the printing press.
scenes.visual: Reveal the hero machine of the story: a big hand-cranked printing press. The government figure grips the crank, about to turn.
scenes.image_prompt: a large hand-cranked printing press in the center of frame, government stick figure gripping the crank handle, a ribbon of blank notes threaded through, single spotlight
scenes.text_anim: Title fades up beneath the machine
scenes.character_action: Hands close around the crank, leaning in.
scenes.audio_cue: Heavy mechanical clunk as it powers up

scenes.narration: And here's the engine of this entire story, so lock it in.
scenes.visual: Direct-address teaching beat. A figure taps a chalkboard/lock icon. 'Pay attention here.'
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure beside a small chalkboard tapping it with a pointer, a padlock icon snapping shut beside the board, focused teaching pose
scenes.text_anim: Padlock clicks shut over the words
scenes.character_action: Taps the board twice with a pointer.

scenes.narration: Money is just claims on stuff.
scenes.visual: Core concept, clean: a balance scale — banknotes on one side, a pile of real goods (bread, a chair, soap) on the other. Equal.
scenes.image_prompt: balance scale perfectly level, paper banknotes on the left pan, a small pile of real goods (a loaf, a chair, a soap bar) on the right pan, clean diagram
scenes.text_anim: Double-arrow draws between the two pans

scenes.narration: If the amount of stuff stays the same, but you double the money chasing it, prices roughly double.
scenes.visual: Animate it: the goods stay fixed; the money pile DOUBLES; the price tags on the goods flip from low to 2x. The whole thesis in one shot.
scenes.image_prompt: the same small pile of goods unchanged, the stack of banknotes beside it visibly doubled in height, price tags on each good, diagram style, faded gold
scenes.text_anim: Money bar grows ×2; price tags roll up from ℳ1 to ℳ2

scenes.narration: Print faster than your country makes things, and every mark in every pocket quietly becomes worth less.
scenes.visual: A coin sitting in an open palm visibly shrinks / fades smaller and smaller. The press churns in the background.
scenes.image_prompt: an open stick figure palm holding a coin that is visibly shrinking and fading, a printing press churning out notes in the soft background
scenes.text_anim: The word 'less' itself shrinks as it's said
scenes.character_action: Palm tilts, watching the coin shrink.

scenes.narration: At first it's a slow leak.
scenes.visual: A pipe with a single slow drip of coins/value. Small, almost harmless.
scenes.image_prompt: a metal pipe with a single slow drip of coins leaking from a tiny crack into a puddle below, quiet, lots of negative space
scenes.text_anim: Small caption near the drip

scenes.narration: Prices creep up. The mark slips against the dollar.
scenes.visual: A line chart inching gently upward (prices) while a tiny mark-vs-dollar bar ticks the wrong way. Still gentle.
scenes.image_prompt: a simple line chart creeping gently upward from left to right, a small currency comparison bar beside it ticking slightly down, calm sepia
scenes.text_anim: Line animates up a little; arrows nudge

scenes.narration: Annoying, but survivable.
scenes.visual: A figure gives an irritated shrug at a price tag that ticked up a notch. Mildly peeved, not panicked — yet.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure giving an annoyed shrug at a small price tag that has ticked up one notch, mildly irritated posture
scenes.text_anim: Caption fades, then a beat
scenes.character_action: Shrug, palms up, eye-roll body language.

scenes.narration: Then it stops being a leak and becomes a whirlpool.
scenes.visual: Match the drip pipe to a violent spinning vortex — money swirling down a drain. The signature image of the spiral.
scenes.image_prompt: a powerful swirling vortex / whirlpool made of spinning banknotes funneling down into a dark drain, motion spiral lines, muted red and gold caught in the swirl
scenes.audio_cue: Whoosh into a deep spinning rush

scenes.narration: And the reason why is the thing that turns ordinary bad inflation into a monster.
scenes.visual: The vortex begins to take the shape of a faint monster mouth/eye. Foreboding.
scenes.image_prompt: swirling banknote vortex subtly forming the silhouette of a monstrous open mouth and a single glowing eye, dark, ominous
scenes.text_anim: Word 'monster' creeps in, jagged edges

scenes.narration: Watch what regular people start doing.
scenes.visual: Pull back to a street of ordinary stick figures, about to behave in a way that makes it worse. 'Watch.'
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an ordinary street with several stick figure citizens standing about, neutral, on the verge of motion, sepia town
scenes.text_anim: Caption fades low
scenes.character_action: Figures begin to stir.

scenes.narration: If you know prices will be higher tomorrow, what's the dumbest thing you can possibly do?
scenes.visual: A figure stands with a big question mark over its head, holding a stack of cash, thinking.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure standing holding a stack of cash, a large question mark hovering above its head, thinking pose, hand on chin
scenes.text_anim: Big question mark bounces in
scenes.character_action: Scratches head, looks at the cash in hand.

scenes.narration: Hold cash.
scenes.visual: Punchline: the cash in its hands visibly melts / rots like spoiling fruit. Holding it is the trap.
scenes.image_prompt: close-up of stick figure hands clutching a stack of banknotes that is visibly melting and rotting at the edges like decaying fruit, flies buzzing
scenes.text_anim: Words appear then visibly 'rot'/drip at the edges
scenes.character_action: Hands recoil from the rotting cash.

scenes.narration: So the second anyone gets paid, they sprint to spend it, on anything, bread, soap, a chair, before it rots in their hands.
scenes.visual: A figure bursts away from a pay window in a full sprint, arms full of random goods (bread, soap, a chair), motion lines everywhere.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure sprinting at full speed away from a pay window, arms overflowing with random goods — a loaf, soap bar, a chair — heavy motion lines, comic urgency
scenes.text_anim: Words streak past with the runner (speed-blur)
scenes.character_action: Mid-sprint, legs blurred, dropping nothing.

scenes.narration: But everyone spending instantly means money changes hands faster and faster,
scenes.visual: A coin getting passed hand-to-hand-to-hand down a line of figures, accelerating, leaving a blur trail.
scenes.image_prompt: a coin being passed rapidly hand to hand down a row of stick figures, accelerating blur trail behind it, motion arcs
scenes.text_anim: Arrow speeds up; trail lengthens
scenes.character_action: Hands slap the coin along the chain.

scenes.narration: and that itself shoves prices up quicker, which makes people spend even faster.
scenes.visual: Price tags flipping upward rapidly as the coin whizzes past; the chart line steepens.
scenes.image_prompt: row of price tags flipping upward rapidly in sequence, a chart line in the background steepening sharply, motion energy, red accent creeping in
scenes.text_anim: Price tags roll up fast, chart line jerks steeper

scenes.narration: Meanwhile, the government's own bills are ballooning, so it prints more to keep up,
scenes.visual: The government figure cranking the press faster, sweat flying, a balloon labeled with its growing bills swelling beside it.
scenes.image_prompt: government stick figure cranking a printing press faster and faster, sweat droplets flying, a large balloon swelling beside it, notes spewing out
scenes.text_anim: 'MORE' inflates like a balloon
scenes.character_action: Cranks frantically, leaning into it.

scenes.narration: which pushes prices higher, so it prints even more.
scenes.visual: The balloon swells bigger; the press blurs faster. The loop is obviously runaway now.
scenes.image_prompt: the balloon swelling even bigger near bursting, the printing press now a motion-blurred frenzy of flying notes, red glow intensifying
scenes.text_anim: Loop of arrows races around in a circle
scenes.character_action: Arms a blur on the crank.

scenes.narration: That's the trap. It feeds on itself.
scenes.visual: The vicious cycle made explicit: a circular ouroboros-style loop of arrows — print → prices → spend → print — a snake eating its tail, made of banknotes.
scenes.image_prompt: a circular loop of four arrows forming an ouroboros made of banknotes, a snake-like ribbon of cash biting its own tail, central spiral, red and gold
scenes.text_anim: Loop spins; caption pulses in the center
scenes.transition: Hard cut to clean loop graphic

scenes.narration: Every turn of the spiral makes the next turn worse.
scenes.visual: A spiral drawn outward, each loop bigger and redder than the last. Escalation visualized.
scenes.image_prompt: an expanding spiral drawn from the center outward, each successive loop larger and more saturated red than the last, banknote fragments caught in it
scenes.text_anim: Spiral draws itself outward, accelerating

scenes.narration: The press can never catch up, because the press is the thing causing the chase.
scenes.visual: A figure on a treadmill chasing its own printed money that keeps fleeing ahead — it can never reach it because the press behind keeps making more.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure running on a treadmill chasing a stack of banknotes dangling just ahead of it, a printing press behind pushing more notes forward, futile loop
scenes.text_anim: Caption fades; the runner stays in place
scenes.character_action: Runs hard but goes nowhere.

scenes.narration: And then someone pours gasoline on it.
scenes.visual: A red gas can tips over the spiral/fire and pours. Dramatic ignition incoming.
scenes.image_prompt: a red jerry can tipping and pouring fuel onto a small fire/spiral below, anticipation of ignition, dark background, strong red accent
scenes.character_action: A hand tips the can.

scenes.narration: Germany falls behind on reparations, misses deliveries of coal and timber.
scenes.visual: A delivery cart with a 'COAL / TIMBER' load sits broken-down/empty; an overdue stamp hits a reparations ledger.
scenes.image_prompt: a broken-down delivery cart meant for coal and timber sitting empty with a flat wheel, an overdue stamp slamming onto a ledger beside it
scenes.text_anim: Red 'OVERDUE' stamp slams diagonally

scenes.narration: So France and Belgium send in troops and occupy the Ruhr, Germany's industrial heartland:
scenes.visual: Map of Germany; the Ruhr region pulses red; foreign soldier-figures (different helmets) march into it across the border.
scenes.image_prompt: a simple map outline of Germany on aged paper, the Ruhr region glowing pulsing red, a column of foreign stick figure soldiers marching across the border into it
scenes.text_anim: Region label pins onto the map; border arrow pushes in
scenes.character_action: Soldier column advances onto the map.

scenes.narration: the coal, the steel, the factories, the engine room of the whole economy.
scenes.visual: Inside the Ruhr: rows of factory smokestacks, coal heaps, steel girders — now under a foreign flag. The economic heart.
scenes.image_prompt: rows of factory smokestacks, coal heaps and stacked steel girders in an industrial district, a foreign flag now planted over them, sepia with red flag accent
scenes.text_anim: Three labels tick in over the icons
scenes.transition: Push-in onto the map → factory district
scenes.audio_cue: Industrial hum (then cut off next scene)

scenes.narration: Germany can't fight back with an army, so it tries something else, passive resistance.
scenes.visual: A German figure lowers an empty rifle (can't fight) and instead sits firmly down, arms crossed — refusal, not violence.
scenes.image_prompt: stick figure lowering an empty rifle to the ground, then sitting firmly down cross-legged with arms folded in defiant refusal, calm but stubborn
scenes.text_anim: Title fades in, calm/steady
scenes.character_action: Sets down rifle, sits, folds arms.

scenes.narration: It tells the workers of the Ruhr: don't produce anything for the occupiers.
scenes.visual: Rows of worker figures standing with arms crossed in front of cold, smokeless factories. Tools downed.
scenes.image_prompt: rows of worker stick figures standing with arms crossed in front of factories whose chimneys emit NO smoke, tools lying on the ground, quiet defiance
scenes.text_anim: Caption stamps over the idle factory
scenes.character_action: Workers stand still, arms crossed.

scenes.narration: Strike. Go home.
scenes.visual: Workers turn and walk off, lunchpails in hand, factory dark behind them.
scenes.image_prompt: line of worker stick figures turning and walking away from a darkened factory, lunchpails in hand, heading home, backs to the building
scenes.text_anim: Word stamps, then 'GO HOME.' replaces it
